name: Uncleared Swap Initial Margin Threshold
description: All uncleared interest rate swaps must maintain initial margin at or above the CFTC-mandated threshold. Breach triggers required action within deadline.
demo_significance: This is the control that flips during the CFTC margin amendment demo.

name: BNPL Late Fee Disclosure Compliance
description: All BNPL late fees must be disclosed in customer agreements per CFPB guidance. Disclosure must include calculation method and maximum amount.

name: SAR Filing Timeliness
description: Suspicious Activity Reports must be filed with FinCEN within 30 calendar days of initial detection. Backlog older than 25 days warrants action.

name: OFAC Sanctions Screening Coverage
description: All counterparties and customer beneficial owners screened against current OFAC SDN list at least once per business day.

name: Material Cyber Incident Disclosure (SEC)
description: Material cybersecurity incidents disclosed via Form 8-K Item 1.05 within 4 business days of materiality determination.

name: Customer Identification Program (CIP) Coverage
description: All new customer onboardings must complete CIP within 30 days of account opening. Documentation must be verified and retained.

name: Reg E Provisional Credit Timing
description: When customer disputes a transaction under Reg E, provisional credit must be issued within 10 business days if investigation incomplete.

name: Cross-Border Wire Reporting (CTR + Form 105)
description: Currency transactions above $10K reported via CTR. International wire transfers >$10K also require Form 105 filing with US Customs.
